text:
Created attachment 158669
Patch to update multimedia/emby-server to 3.0.5667.6

Update multimedia/emby-server to latest upstream release 3.0.5667.6.

Changes this release:
 * Support HLS in Chrome and Internet Explorer
 * New Social Media Sharing Feature
 * Bravia Dlna fixes
